parents.subject: LU-10391 lnet: convert nids in lnet_parse to lnet_nid

commit.subject: LU-10391 lnet: change src_nid arg to lnet_parse() to 16byte
commit.message:
LU-10391 lnet: change src_nid arg to lnet_parse() to 16byte

lnet_parse() now gets the source nid as 'struct lnet_nid *'.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: serverversion=2.12 serverdistro=el7.9 testlist=runtests
Test-Parameters: clientversion=2.12 testlist=runtests
